title: CAST AI Node Template
description: A Node Template defines instance type constraints and configuration for nodes provisioned by the CAST AI autoscaler.

id.description: Unique identifier for the node template.

configurationId.description: ID of the associated node configuration.

minCpu.description: Minimum number of CPUs for the node.

maxCpu.description: Maximum number of CPUs for the node.

minMemory.description: Minimum memory in MiB for the node.

maxMemory.description: Maximum memory in MiB for the node.

useSpotInstances.description: Whether to use spot or preemptible instances.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the node template was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the node template was last updated.
